sample_findings.summary: Maverick spend: PO 2 from CRP1  India Pvt Ltd ($50,000.00) has no active blanket agreement
sample_findings.rationale: Purchases made outside of active blanket/contract agreements bypass negotiated pricing and compliance controls. These represent unauthorized off-contract spend.

recommended_actions: Establish blanket agreement with this supplier
Route future orders through procurement approval
Investigate if this spend could be consolidated

sample_findings.summary: Item 234205 sourced from only one supplier (CRP1  India Pvt Ltd) - supply chain risk
sample_findings.rationale: Single-source items are a supply chain vulnerability. Disruption from this supplier would halt production. Dual-sourcing or approved alternate supplier registration is recommended.

recommended_actions: Qualify an alternate supplier for this item
Add to approved supplier list (ASL) in Oracle
Build safety stock to buffer single-source risk
